actor.goal: to transform one authorized artifact into the next authorized artifact

story.iWant: to transform one authorized artifact into the next authorized artifact
story.soThat: no single agent becomes a giant hidden authoring blob

acceptanceCriteria.statement: Lane Workers owns only: one lane input, one lane output, one lane receipt, bounded transformation.
Lane Workers must not own: whole pipeline truth, previous lane repair, downstream release, hidden fallback.
Every materialized output must be receipt-backed.
No invisible execution path is allowed.

forbiddenClaims: Lane Workers owns whole pipeline truth
Lane Workers owns previous lane repair
